mapper.sql: ep.id, ep.equipment_id, e.name AS equipment_name, ep.checkin_id, ep.process_type, ep.description, ep.cost, ep.status, ep.completed_at, ep.created_at
mapper.select: SELECT FROM equipment_processes ep LEFT JOIN equipment e ON e.id = ep.equipment_id AND e.deleted_at IS NULL WHERE ep.checkin_id = #{checkinId} AND ep.deleted_at IS NULL ORDER BY ep.created_at DESC
SELECT FROM equipment_processes ep LEFT JOIN equipment e ON e.id = ep.equipment_id AND e.deleted_at IS NULL WHERE ep.id = #{id} AND ep.deleted_at IS NULL
SELECT id, equipment_id, checkin_id, process_type, description, cost, status, completed_at, created_at, updated_at, deleted_at FROM equipment_processes WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted_at IS NULL
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO equipment_processes (equipment_id, checkin_id, process_type, description, cost, status, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{equipmentId}, #{checkinId}, #{processType}, #{description}, #{cost}, #{status}, NOW(), NOW())
mapper.update: UPDATE equipment_processes SET status = 'completed', completed_at = NOW(), updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted_at IS NULL
